highlights: The AI landscape is witnessing a rapid deployment of highly capable Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) models with extended context windows, exemplified by Tencent's Hy3 and Meituan's LongCat-2.0, enhancing performance for complex and long-context tasks.

OpenAI is leading innovation with new model capabilities, including low-latency GPT-Realtime models for voice agents and a preview of the next-generation GPT-5.6 Sol, alongside strategic hardware collaborations like the LLM-optimized inference chip with Broadcom.

The development of AI agents is accelerating, with research focusing on advanced orchestration for open-ended discovery, object-centric environment modeling for improved learning, and applications in critical domains such as medical diagnosis and cybersecurity.

agents.title: OpenAI Releases GPT-Realtime-2.1 and GPT-Realtime-2.1-mini for Low-Latency Voice Agents in the API
agents.summary: OpenAI has updated its API with GPT-Realtime-2.1 and a new mini variant, designed for low-latency voice agents, along with a 25% reduction in p95 latency. This enables developers to build highly responsive conversational AI systems at improved cost-efficiency.

agents.title: iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni Technical Report
agents.summary: iFLYTEK-Embodied-Omni introduces a unified multimodal foundation model for general-purpose embodied agents, integrating vision, language, and action into a single framework. This architecture improves instruction understanding, world modeling, and precise control for complex agent tasks.

agents.title: SwarmResearch: Orchestrating Coding Agents for Open-Ended Discovery
agents.summary: SwarmResearch is an orchestrator-subagent framework that uses a Shepherd Agent to steer a population of Search Agents, each with local context, for open-ended code optimization. This approach enhances high-level exploration and discovers better solutions compared to existing multi-agent techniques.

models.title: OpenAI Previews GPT-5.6 Sol: a Next-Generation Model
models.summary: OpenAI has previewed GPT-5.6 Sol, its next-generation model, boasting enhanced capabilities in coding, science, and cybersecurity, coupled with its most advanced safety stack. This indicates a significant leap in performance across critical domains for developers.

models.title: Meituan Releases LongCat-2.0: A 1.6T-Parameter Open MoE Model with Native 1M Context and LongCat Sparse Attention
models.summary: Meituan unveiled LongCat-2.0, an open 1.6 trillion-parameter Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) model featuring a native 1-million-token context window. This model provides unprecedented long-context capabilities for demanding applications, trained on domestic AI ASIC superpods.

models.title: Tencent Releases Hy3: An Open 295B Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) Model with 21B Active Parameters and 256K Context
models.summary: Tencent's Hy3 is an open 295B Mixture-of-Experts model, activating 21B parameters per token, featuring a 256K context window under Apache 2.0 license. It excels in reasoning, agentic, and long-context tasks, offering a powerful open-source option for developers.

tools.title: Synthetic Sciences Releases OpenScience: An Open-Source, Model-Agnostic AI Workbench for Scientific Research
tools.summary: OpenScience, an Apache-2.0 AI workbench from Synthetic Sciences, offers a model-agnostic platform for scientific research, compatible with any LLM via API keys. It provides 250+ editable skills and scientific databases, deployable on custom infrastructure.

tools.title: VERITAS: Towards a General-Purpose Replication Tool for Scientific Research
tools.summary: VERITAS is a new domain-agnostic replication framework built around CLI coding agents, designed to automate the verification of scientific research by extracting claims, running methodologies, and judging findings against experimental evidence. It achieves state-of-the-art performance on benchmarks, providing a crucial tool for reproducibility.

tools.title: Run a vLLM Server on HF Jobs in One Command
tools.summary: Hugging Face now enables users to deploy a vLLM server on HF Jobs with a single command, significantly simplifying the process of serving large language models for inference. This streamlines development workflows and enhances accessibility for model deployment.

companies.title: HP Inc. launches Frontier strategic partnership with OpenAI
companies.summary: HP Inc. has scaled its strategic partnership with OpenAI to deploy AI across customer experiences, software development, and enterprise operations, demonstrating a significant corporate commitment to integrating advanced AI.

companies.title: OpenAI and Broadcom unveil LLM-optimized inference chip
companies.summary: OpenAI and Broadcom have introduced Jalapeño, a custom AI chip specifically designed for LLM inference, aiming to significantly improve performance, efficiency, and scalability for AI systems. This represents a strategic hardware collaboration for AI infrastructure.

companies.title: OpenAI Introduces Daybreak Initiative for Global Cybersecurity with New Tools
companies.summary: OpenAI launched the Daybreak initiative, featuring new tools like Codex Security and GPT-5.5-Cyber, designed to help organizations find, validate, and patch vulnerabilities at scale. This strategic move positions OpenAI to secure global organizations and support open-source maintainers.

learning.title: Building a Scaffold-Split Random Forest QSAR Co-Scientist for EGFR Inhibitor Discovery Using ChEMBL, RDKit, SHAP, and BRICS
learning.summary: This tutorial guides builders through constructing an autonomous AI co-scientist for drug discovery, leveraging ChEMBL, RDKit, SHAP, and BRICS to identify and generate novel EGFR inhibitor candidates. It provides practical steps for applying ML to molecular design.

learning.title: Structured PDF-to-JSON: A Guide to Open-Source Extraction Models in 2026
learning.summary: A comprehensive guide provides an overview of open-source models and methods for converting unstructured PDF data into structured JSON, a critical step for integrating vast amounts of enterprise data with LLMs and agents for analytical tasks.

learning.title: Training Gemma-3 for Structured Mathematical Reasoning with Tunix GRPO, LoRA Adapters, and GSM8K Rewards
learning.summary: This guide details an end-to-end GRPO training workflow for fine-tuning Gemma-3, improving its mathematical reasoning by defining reward functions for format adherence and numeric correctness, and utilizing LoRA adapters for efficient training.
